name: PIPA compliance check
prompt: 이 프로젝트에서 개인정보보호법 준수 여부를 검토해줘

assertions.text: Compliance Matrix includes PIPA-specific articles: Art. 15, Art. 3, Art. 21, Art. 24, Art. 30, Art. 17
Each compliance item cites specific article number (e.g., 'Art. 15') not just framework name
Data Classification step is present and completed before Compliance Matrix
Every compliance status is exactly one of: PASS, FAIL, UNVERIFIED
UNVERIFIED items include description of what evidence is needed to confirm
Report still includes all 6 domain scores and SPS (not just compliance section)
Agent verified claims by reading actual project files (references to specific files in ai-config-sync)
